description_long: This house features a modern, rectangular design with a combination of flat and gable roofs. The property is enclosed by a low fence and includes a small yard with a tree and landscaped areas. The main structure has two stories, with large windows on the ground floor and a smaller upper level. A covered patio or sunroom with transparent roofing is attached to one side, providing an outdoor living space. The entryway is marked by a small porch with steps and a simple door, and there are additional outdoor elements such as a swing set and garden beds. The exterior is predominantly light-colored, with minimal decorative detailing and a focus on clean, geometric lines.
description: A modern two-story house with a mix of flat and gable roofs, large windows, a fenced yard, and a covered patio. The design is clean and geometric, with landscaped outdoor areas and minimal ornamentation.
description_view_0: Side view showing the main entrance, a tree in the yard, and the covered patio area with transparent roofing.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the gable roof, large ground-floor windows, and the fenced yard with outdoor seating and a swing set.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the flat-roofed section, additional landscaping, and the rear of the covered patio.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back entrance, upper-level balcony, and the tree within the fenced yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large ground-floor windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple entry with a small porch, steps, and a plain door, lacking ornate features.
